title: eMKay® Small Classic Stainless Steel Hand Bell - GOLD (12cm Tall)
features: ✅【Package Content】 Includes 1 piece of eMKay Hand held bell, made of GOLD polished stainless steel and is attached to a black wooden handle
✅【Measurement】 The bottom diameter of the bell is 6,5 cm/ 2.55 inch, the whole height of the hand bell is 12 cm/ 4.72 inch; Lightweight, right size, easy to operate

✅【Loud Call】 Metal ball inside makes clear & loud sound, allowing you to ring the call bell for assistance from caregivers or family members from all positions (downwards, upwards or side ways). Note: please don't cover the body of the bell, just grip the handle of our bell to ring and make the clear and loud sound.

✅【Wide Application】 Our hand bells are suitable for restaurants, hotels, stores, school, coffee shop bell, hand bell for elderly, patients, handicapped, jingle bell for a Christmas toy and can also be used as a wedding event decoration.etc.
description: Product description ✅【Package Content】 Includes 1 piece of eMKay Hand held bell, made of GOLD polished stainless steel and is attached to a black wooden handle ✅【Measurement】 The bottom diameter of the bell is 6,5 cm/ 2.55 inch, the whole height of the hand bell is 12 cm/ 4.72 inch; Lightweight, right size, easy to operate ✅【Loud Call】 Metal ball inside makes clear & loud sound, allowing you to ring the call bell for assistance from caregivers or family members from all positions (downwards, upwards or side ways). Note: please don't cover the body of the bell, just grip the handle of our bell to ring and make the clear and loud sound. ✅【Wide Application】 Our hand bells are suitable for restaurants, hotels, stores, school, coffee shop bell, hand bell for elderly, patients, handicapped, jingle bell for a Christmas toy and can also be used as a wedding event decoration.etc. Safety Warning Do not cover the body of the bell while ringing. This product is intended for use by caregivers or family members, including elderly or handicapped individuals, and should be used with caution.

specifications_table.Occasion: Christmas, Easter, GET WELL, Mother’s Day, SWEET SENTIMENTS
